response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, REST APIs, and databases, plus strong architecture and open-source contributions, but his recent career gap, lack of explicit PostgreSQL/Nest.js experience, and minimal AWS/Kubernetes exposure raise concerns about current relevance for this specific renewable energy tech role, especially given high on-site requirements.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven track record in scalable systems and open-source platform development
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: Recent career gap (Oct 2025–present) with no recent professional coding activity
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS/Kubernetes as required/nice-to-have
Basic German language proficiency may hinder on-site collaboration in Berlin
